hooks.command: [ -n "$AGENTFY_TOKEN" ] || exit 0; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "SessionStart"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

[ -n "$AGENTFY_TOKEN" ] || exit 0; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "PermissionRequest"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

[ -n "$AGENTFY_TOKEN" ] || exit 0; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "Stop"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true

[ -n "$AGENTFY_TOKEN" ] || exit 0; jq -c '. + {hook_event_name: "Notification"}' | curl -s -X POST https://webhook.getagentfy.com -H "Authorization: Bearer $AGENTFY_TOKEN" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- > /dev/null 2>&1 || true
